props.name: actions
props.description: Actions data, passed down to Spotlight.Action component

props.name: centered
props.description: If set, the modal is centered vertically

props.name: children
props.description: Modal content

props.name: clearQueryOnClose
props.description: Determines whether the search query should be cleared when the spotlight is closed

props.name: closeOnActionTrigger
props.description: Determines whether spotlight should be closed when one of the actions is triggered

props.name: closeOnClickOutside
props.description: If set, the modal/drawer is closed when user clicks on the overlay

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: If set, onClose is called when user presses the escape key

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, spotlight will not be rendered

props.name: filter
props.description: Function to filter actions data based on search query, by default actions are filtered by title, description and keywords

props.name: forceOpened
props.description: Forces opened state, useful for tests

props.name: fullScreen
props.description: If set, the modal takes the entire screen

props.name: highlightQuery
props.description: Determines whether search query should be highlighted in action label

props.name: id
props.description: Id used to connect modal/drawer with body and title

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set modal/drawer is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden. display: none styles are applied instead.

props.name: limit
props.description: Maximum number of actions displayed at a time

props.name: lockScroll
props.description: If set, scroll is locked when opened={true}

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Spotlight content max-height. Ignored unless scrollable prop is set.

props.name: nothingFound
props.description: Message displayed when none of the actions match given filter

props.name: onEnterTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when enter transition ends

props.name: onExitTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when exit transition ends

props.name: onQueryChange
props.description: Called when query changes

props.name: onSpotlightClose
props.description: Called when spotlight closes

props.name: onSpotlightOpen
props.description: Called when spotlight opens

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Overlay component, use to configure opacity, background-color, styles and other properties

props.name: padding
props.description: Key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value to set content, header and footer padding

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Portal component when withinPortal is set

props.name: query
props.description: Controlled Spotlight search query

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: removeScrollProps
props.description: Props passed down to react-remove-scroll, can be used to customize scroll lock behavior

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: If set, focus is returned to the last active element when onClose is called

props.name: scrollAreaComponent
props.description: Scroll area component

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to the ScrollArea component

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Determines whether the actions list should be scrollable. If not set, maxHeight is ignored

props.name: searchProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Spotlight.Search

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any valid CSS box-shadow value

props.name: shortcut
props.description: Keyboard shortcut or a list of shortcuts to trigger spotlight

props.name: size
props.description: Controls width of the content area

props.name: stackId
props.description: Id of the modal in the Modal.Stack

props.name: store
props.description: Spotlight store, can be used to create multiple instances of spotlight

props.name: tagsToIgnore
props.description: A list of tags which when focused will be ignored by shortcut

props.name: title
props.description: Modal title

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props added to the Transition component that used to animate overlay and body, use to configure duration and animation type, { duration: 200, transition: 'fade-down' } by default

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: If set, focus is trapped within the modal/drawer

props.name: triggerOnContentEditable
props.description: Determines whether shortcut should trigger based in contentEditable

props.name: withOverlay
props.description: If set, the overlay is rendered

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: If set, the component is rendered inside Portal

props.name: xOffset
props.description: Left/right modal offset

props.name: yOffset
props.description: Top/bottom modal offset

props.name: zIndex
props.description: z-index CSS property of the root element

props.name: centered
props.description: If set, the modal is centered vertically

props.name: children
props.description: Modal content

props.name: clearQueryOnClose
props.description: Determines whether the search query should be cleared when the spotlight is closed

props.description: Determines whether spotlight should be closed when one of the actions is triggered

props.description: If set, the modal/drawer is closed when user clicks on the overlay

props.description: If set, onClose is called when user presses the escape key

props.description: If set, spotlight will not be rendered

props.description: Forces opened state, useful for tests

props.description: If set, the modal takes the entire screen

props.name: id
props.description: Id used to connect modal/drawer with body and title

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set modal/drawer is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden. display: none styles are applied instead.

props.name: lockScroll
props.description: If set, scroll is locked when opened={true}

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Spotlight content max-height. Ignored unless scrollable prop is set.

props.name: onEnterTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when enter transition ends

props.description: Called when exit transition ends

props.description: Called when query changes

props.description: Called when spotlight closes

props.description: Props passed down to the Overlay component, use to configure opacity, background-color, styles and other properties

props.name: padding
props.description: Key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value to set content, header and footer padding

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Portal component when withinPortal is set

props.name: query
props.description: Controlled Spotlight search query

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: removeScrollProps
props.description: Props passed down to react-remove-scroll, can be used to customize scroll lock behavior

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: If set, focus is returned to the last active element when onClose is called

props.name: scrollAreaComponent
props.description: Scroll area component

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Determines whether the actions list should be scrollable. If not set, maxHeight is ignored

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any valid CSS box-shadow value

props.name: shortcut
props.description: Keyboard shortcut or a list of shortcuts to trigger spotlight

props.name: size
props.description: Controls width of the content area

props.name: stackId
props.description: Id of the modal in the Modal.Stack

props.name: store
props.description: Spotlight store, can be used to create multiple instances of spotlight

props.name: tagsToIgnore
props.description: A list of tags which when focused will be ignored by shortcut

props.name: title
props.description: Modal title

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props added to the Transition component that used to animate overlay and body, use to configure duration and animation type, { duration: 200, transition: 'fade-down' } by default

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: If set, focus is trapped within the modal/drawer

props.name: triggerOnContentEditable
props.description: Determines whether shortcut should trigger based in contentEditable

props.name: withOverlay
props.description: If set, the overlay is rendered

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: If set, the component is rendered inside Portal

props.name: xOffset
props.description: Left/right modal offset

props.name: yOffset
props.description: Top/bottom modal offset

props.name: zIndex
props.description: z-index CSS property of the root element

props.name: children
props.description: Children override default action elements, if passed, label, description and sections are hidden

props.name: closeSpotlightOnTrigger
props.description: Determines whether the spotlight should be closed when action is triggered, overrides closeOnActionTrigger prop set on Spotlight

props.name: description
props.description: Action description, pass string to use in default filter

props.name: dimmedSections
props.description: Determines whether left and right sections should have dimmed styles

props.name: highlightColor
props.description: Key of theme.colors of any valid CSS color that will be used to highlight search query

props.name: highlightQuery
props.description: Determines whether search query should be highlighted in action label

props.name: keywords
props.description: Keywords that are used for default filtering, not displayed anywhere, can be a string: "react,router,javascript" or an array: ['react', 'router', 'javascript']

props.name: label
props.description: Action label, pass string to use in default filter

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Section displayed on the left side of the label, for example, icon

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Section displayed on the right side of the label, for example, hotkey

props.name: children
props.description: Spotlight.Action components

props.name: label
props.description: Group label

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute on the input element

props.name: error
props.description: Determines whether the input should have error styles and aria-invalid attribute

props.name: id
props.description: Input element id

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: multiline
props.description: Adjusts padding and sizing calculations for multiline inputs (use with component="textarea"). Does not make the input multiline by itself.

props.name: pointer
props.description: Determines whether the input should have cursor: pointer style. Use when input acts as a button-like trigger (e.g., component="button" for Select/DatePicker).

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: required
props.description: Sets required attribute on the input element

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: rootRef
props.description: Root element ref

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height, horizontal padding, and font-size

props.name: withAria
props.description: Determines whether aria- and other accessibility attributes should be added to the input. Only disable when implementing custom accessibility handling.

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element of the Input component
